notes: This batch processes only HEAT_DUMPS/20260225T070252Z and treats it as a historical timestamped heat-dump root, not as current runtime authority.
The root splits into exactly two meaningful branches: RUN_ENGINE_ENTROPY_0001 and repo_archive__moved_out_of_git.
RUN_ENGINE_ENTROPY_0001 is sandbox-shaped rather than run-shaped at this boundary, with 2558 files across consumed JSONs, lawyer memos, and prompt queues.

The role names in the engine-entropy branch repeat six lens/rescuer families plus a seventh PACK_SELECTOR prompt role, which makes it look like prompt-orchestration residue rather than earned runtime state.
repo_archive__moved_out_of_git is much larger, with 25056 files and 1166 directories, and already preserves its own cache/deep-archive/ops-log taxonomy plus an archive index.
ARCHIVE_INDEX_v1.json inside the moved-out-of-git branch records one latest checkpoint and ten recent heat-dump references under a nested cache subtree.

The nested mirror also preserves naming drift and topology seams: OPS_LOGS casing differs from later roots, the direct nested HEAT_DUMPS child is empty, and checkpoint/recent-heat bookkeeping lives beside that emptiness.
This root batch does not descend into either child family beyond structural signatures and the nested archive index.
possible_downstream_consequence_policy: possible downstream consequence only; no direct A2-1 or A1 promotion from this batch
